title: Entity Slime Float Behavior
description: Allow slimes to float in water / lava.

jump_chance_percentage.title: Jump Chance Percentage
jump_chance_percentage.description: Percent chance a slime or magma cube has to jump while in water / lava.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description:
As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

Sample values:
• magma_cube: 1

speed_multiplier.title: Speed Multiplier
speed_multiplier.description: Determines the multiplier the entity's speed is modified by when moving through water / lava.
